title: Boarding and Daycare Business Settings Discounts
subtitle: Build flexible discounts for boarding, daycare, grooming, and training. Scope each rule to the services you want, add optional client qualifiers, and set booking thresholds like minimum nights or pet count.
missing_business: We couldn't resolve a business account for this user.
resolve_business_error: Failed to load your business account.
policy_subtitle: Set the default behavior for bookings or invoices that qualify for more than one discount rule.
policy_help_best_single: If a booking qualifies for more than one discount, Petunia will apply only the one that gives the client the biggest savings.
policy_help_stack: If a booking qualifies for multiple discounts, Petunia will apply all of them together.
policy_help_manual: Petunia will not choose automatically. Your staff will review the booking and decide which discount should be used.
rules_subtitle: Create as many service-specific discount rules as you need.
empty_state: No discount rules yet. Add your first rule to start defining how discounts should work.
modal_subtitle: Use this form for service-specific discounts like veteran boarding discounts, stay-length discounts, or other custom rules.
custom_labels_helper: Useful for labels like active military, rescue partner, breeder referral, or any other eligibility group you want to define.
field_custom_qualifiers_placeholder: Enter one label per line or separate labels with commas
field_notes_placeholder: Optional staff note for how this discount should be interpreted or applied.
